name: Texas South Energy, Inc.
summary: Texas South Energy, Inc. engages in the business of exploring for, drilling, and producing oil and gas. As of April 1, 2019, it owned 12 blocks in 9 offshore prospects in the Gulf of Mexico, as well as oil and gas interests in Texas and Louisiana. The company was formerly known as Inka Productions Corp. and changed its name to Texas South Energy, Inc. in November 2013. Texas South Energy, Inc. was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Houston, Texas.
